description.content: Use this API to get NFT activity

query.description: (Required)
(Required) The activity types to query
(Required) The activity types to query
`From time` of time range to query
`To time` of time range to query
(Required) Asset Id to filter for activities. Either `assetId` or `collectionId` or `walletAddress` should be provided. example: `0xbd3531da5cf5857e7cfaa92426877b022e612cf8:0`
(Required) Collection Id to filter for activities. Either `assetId` or `collectionId` or `walletAddress` should be provided. example: `0xbd3531da5cf5857e7cfaa92426877b022e612cf8`
(Required) User wallet address to filter for activities. Either `assetId` or `collectionId` or `walletAddress` should be provided. example: `0x47d88afbba889709abba07339ed1c88079944ca3`
Amount of items returned, default to __20__
Use continuation token to request next offset of items.

response.name: Successful

description.content: Use this API to explore a collection's metadata and statistics (sales, volume, etc).

response.name: Successful

description.content: Use this API to explore a user's collections metadata and statistics (sales, volume, etc).

response.name: Successful

description.content: Use this API to do a fuzzy collection search

response.name: Successful

description.content: Generate bids. This API is used to generate bid data to sign. Once you get signing data from this API, you shall sign them and post to another bid creation API to finish bid generation
Generate bids. This API is used to create bids with signature provided
Bulk transfer assets(tokens). This API is used to generate asset bulk transfer transaction data
Buy assets(tokens). This API is used to generate transaction data to buy assets

Cancel Orders. This API is used to generate order cancellation data to sign. Once you get signing data from this API, you shall sign them and post to another order cancellation API to finish order cancellation
Cancel Orders. This API is used to cancel orders with signature provided

Generate listings for assets (tokens). This API is used to generate listing data to sign. Once you get signing data from this API, you shall sign them and post to another listing creation API to finish listing generation
Generate listings for assets (tokens). This API is used to create listings with signature provided
Sell assets(tokens). This API is used to generate transaction data to sell assets
Use this API to search asks

query.description: (Required)
(Required) Direct fetch asks by ids, other filters will be ignored if `ids` is provided. Either `ids` and `collectionId` must be provided
(Required) Direct fetch asks by ids, other filters will be ignored if `ids` is provided. Either `ids` and `collectionId` must be provided
(Required) Filter by collectionId. example: `0xbd3531da5cf5857e7cfaa92426877b022e612cf8`. Either `ids` and `collectionId` must be provided
Filter by asset ids. example: `0xbd3531da5cf5857e7cfaa92426877b022e612cf8:0`
Filter by asset ids. example: `0xbd3531da5cf5857e7cfaa92426877b022e612cf8:0`
Filter by makers who made these asks. example: `0x47d88afbba889709abba07339ed1c88079944ca3`
Filter by makers who made these asks. example: `0x47d88afbba889709abba07339ed1c88079944ca3`
Filter by order source.
Filter by order source.
Filter by order status. default `active`
Filter by order status. default `active`
(Required) Filter orders after some create timestamp using UTC format. example: `2025-05-01T06:01:09.000Z`.
(Required) Filter orders after some update timestamp using UTC format. example: `2025-05-01T06:01:09.000Z`.
Amount of items returned, default to __20__
Use continuation token to request next offset of items.

response.name: Successful

description.content: Use this API to search bids

query.description: (Required)
(Required) Direct fetch bids by ids, other filters will be ignored if `ids` is provided. Either `ids` and `bidTypes[] + collectionId` must be provided
(Required) Direct fetch bids by ids, other filters will be ignored if `ids` is provided. Either `ids` and `bidTypes[] + collectionId` must be provided
(Required) Filter by bid types
(Required) Filter by bid types
(Required) Filter by collectionId. example: `0xbd3531da5cf5857e7cfaa92426877b022e612cf8`. Either `ids` and `collectionId` must be provided
Filter by asset ids. example: `0xbd3531da5cf5857e7cfaa92426877b022e612cf8:0`
Filter by asset ids. example: `0xbd3531da5cf5857e7cfaa92426877b022e612cf8:0`
Filter by attributes, could be a list, format as `<attribute_name>:<attribute_value>`, example: `Background:Black`
Filter by attributes, could be a list, format as `<attribute_name>:<attribute_value>`, example: `Background:Black`
Filter by makers who made these bids. example: `0x47d88afbba889709abba07339ed1c88079944ca3`
Filter by makers who made these bids. example: `0x47d88afbba889709abba07339ed1c88079944ca3`
Filter by order source.
Filter by order source.
Filter by order status. default `active`
Filter by order status. default `active`
(Required) Filter orders after some create timestamp using UTC format. example: `2025-05-01T06:01:09.000Z`.
(Required) Filter orders after some update timestamp using UTC format. example: `2025-05-01T06:01:09.000Z`.
Amount of items returned, default to __20__
Use continuation token to request next offset of items.

response.name: Successful

description.content: Use this API to explore a collection's assets and its market info

query.description: (Required)
(Required) The collection id to query assets. example: `0xbd3531da5cf5857e7cfaa92426877b022e612cf8`
Filter assets by ids. example: `0xbd3531da5cf5857e7cfaa92426877b022e612cf8:0`
Filter assets by ids. example: `0xbd3531da5cf5857e7cfaa92426877b022e612cf8:0`
Filter assets whose floor ask is from specific sources. if `any` is specified, means return assets which are listed only
Filter assets whose floor ask is from specific sources. if `any` is specified, means return assets which are listed only
Filter assets by its name
Whether to include top bid for returned assets, default to __false__
Amount of items returned, default to __20__
Use continuation token to request next offset of assets.

response.name: Successful

description.content: Use this API to explore a user's assets and its market info

query.description: (Required)
(Required) The wallet address (user address) to query assets from, could be a list, example: `0x47d88afbba889709abba07339ed1c88079944ca3`
Filter assets by ids. example: `0xbd3531da5cf5857e7cfaa92426877b022e612cf8:0`
Filter assets by ids. example: `0xbd3531da5cf5857e7cfaa92426877b022e612cf8:0`
Filter assets by collectionIds. example: `0xbd3531da5cf5857e7cfaa92426877b022e612cf8`
Filter assets by collectionIds. example: `0xbd3531da5cf5857e7cfaa92426877b022e612cf8`
Whether to show only listed assets, default to __false__
Whether to include top bid for returned assets, default to __false__
Amount of items returned, default to __20__
Use continuation token to request next offset of assets.

response.name: Successful

description.content: Aggregated Magic Eden EVM API (v4) for Ethereum and L2 chains (Polygon, Base, ApeChain, Arbitrum, Berachain, BSC, SEI, Abstract). Covers collections, assets, bids, asks, listings, buy/sell, and bulk transfer instructions.
